data.name: SystemDesign_CICDDesc1
data.value: Every push to the master branch triggers the CI/CD pipeline. The workflow builds the Uno WASM client with dotnet publish, runs the Spring Boot API build with Maven inside a multi-stage Docker build (compile → download OTel agent → JRE runtime image), and pushes both container images to ECR tagged as :latest.

data.name: SystemDesign_CICDDesc2
data.value: The pipeline then authenticates to the EKS cluster and issues a rolling update by patching the image on both Deployments. EKS performs the rollout gradually — new pods start, liveness and readiness probes pass, then old pods are terminated — keeping the application live throughout the deploy.

data.name: SystemDesign_MonitoringDesc
data.value: Available when running the local Docker Compose stack.
